meta.source: Database engines as square tiles. devicon full-colour logo (preferred) → simple-icons mono glyph on a brand tile → coloured text tile. Curated from a fan-out enumeration (10 categories + completeness critic), keeping real well-known engines with correct logos. Rebuild: python3 scripts/build_pack.py database
